description: This file is an HTML source for a web-based database visualizer interface, including embedded CSS and JavaScript for dynamic behavior.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases from the server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets the view.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Toggles the display of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads and displays tables in a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates and inserts HTML for displaying tabular data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates HTML for individual cell content, handling objects and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for viewing full data.
